NAME

turn_credentials_t - TURN server credentials (username + password).

SYNOPSIS

#include <include/ascii-chat/network/webrtc/turn_credentials.h>

Data Fields


char username [128]
char password [128]
time_t expires_at

Detailed Description

TURN server credentials (username + password).

Unix timestamp when credentials expire
